svg.aria-label: Three eggs in one basket versus one egg in each of three baskets
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="analogy-eggs-baskets"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="420" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" together" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ef6a6a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="26" width="360" height="24" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" svg.text: One stumble — and all three are gone.
One basket tips over — only one egg is lost.
